summary: Save clipboard to Notes, secure note categories, and sidebar branding.

introduced: Save clipboard to Notes setting keeps copied items in the Clipboard Notes folder via iCloud
Passwords and Credentials note categories with structured templates
Note category picker and list filter in the Notes workspace
App logo in the sidebar header beside the Nucleus title
changed: Pinning a clipboard item also saves it to Notes when auto-save is enabled
Sensitive note categories show lock icons and storage reminders
